ddls:
CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_name" TEXT /* Name of the election (e.g., Presidential Election 2024) */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., federal, state, local) */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "registration_deadline" TEXT /* Voter registration deadline */,
  "mail_in_ballot_deadline" TEXT /* Mail-in ballot submission deadline */,
  "in_person_voting_start_date" TEXT /* In-person voting start date */,
  "voter_turnout_percentage" TEXT /* Voter turnout percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "fips_code" TEXT /* FIPS code of the county */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precincts" (
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precinct */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the precinct belongs to */,
  "precinct_name" TEXT /* Name of the precinct */,
  "polling_station" TEXT /* Name of the polling station */,
  "polling_station_address" TEXT /* Address of the polling station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precincts_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the office (e.g., Secretary of State) */,
  "office_type" TEXT /* Type of office (e.g., federal, state, local) */,
  "office_description" TEXT /* Description of the office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* ID of the office the candidate is running for */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the candidate */,
  "candidate_statement" TEXT /* Candidate statement or platform summary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* ID of the precinct */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "election_day_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes cast on election day */,
  "absentee_votes" INTEGER /* Number of absentee votes */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes */,
  "voter_turnout_percentage" TEXT /* Voter turnout percentage for this result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the district belongs to */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "district_type" TEXT /* Type of district (e.g., congressional, state house, local) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election official */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "official_name" TEXT /* Name of the election official */,
  "official_title" TEXT /* Title of the election official */,
  "official_contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information (e.g., email, phone) of the official */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_officials_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., election official, analyst, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of specific permissions the user has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of voters (e.g., 18-24, 25-34) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of voters (e.g., male, female, other) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of voters (e.g., White, Black or African American, Hispanic) */,
  "turnout_percentage" TEXT /* Voter turnout percentage for this demographic group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_demographics_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_finance" (
  "finance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each finance entry */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "donations" TEXT /* Total donations received by the candidate */,
  "expenditures" TEXT /* Total expenditures by the candidate */,
  "cash_on_hand" TEXT /* Cash on hand for the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("finance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_finance_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "polling_station_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* ID of the precinct the staff member is assigned to */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Name of the staff member */,
  "staff_role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., poll worker, inspector) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polling_station_staff_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id")
)
